spell.wizardshelp.summon_priest.guide: A spirit priest manifests at your side, mending your wounds and striking your foes with divine light.
spell.wizardshelp.summon_pyromancer.guid: A fiery ally who burns your foes with ranged pyromantic spells.
spell.wizardshelp.summon_cryomancer.guid: A frost-bound mage rises at your side, unleashing icicles, freezing winds, and counterspells to defend you against all who threaten your path.
spell.wizardshelp.summon_necromancer.gui: A death-forged lich servant rises from the grave at your command, wielding fangs, blight, roots, and forbidden necromancy to destroy all who dare stand against you.
spell.wizardshelp.summon_archevoker.guid: An evocation-born arcane warcaster materializes at your side, channeling fangs, firecrackers, spectral wards, and master-level spellcraft to annihilate any foe reckless enough to challenge your dominion.
spell.wizardshelp.summon_apothecarist.gu: A plagueforged apothecarist steps out of the ether at your command, hurling virulent elixirs, shattering venomglass phials, and weaving restorative brews that keep you standing while your enemies wither and rot around you.
spell.wizardshelp.summon_cultist.guide: A crimson-veiled cultist tears free from the blood-soaked veil at your command, carving sigils into flesh with cursed steel, siphoning life through profane rites, and turning every drop of spilled blood into a weapon that feeds his frenzy as your enemies are bled dry around you.
spell.wizardshelp.summon_keeper.guide: A colossus of charred steel erupts from the inferno at your command, his blade wreathed in undying flames. He stands as an immovable bulwark, cleaving through ranks with searing fury and turning the battlefield into a smoldering graveyard while reducing your foes to ash.
spell.wizardshelp.summon_ice_spider.guid: A crystalline predator of eternal frost skitters from the depths of the glacial void at your command, its fangs dripping with numbing rime. It strikes from the shadows like a winter gale, ensnaring victims in a lethal embrace that freezes the very blood in their veins, leaving behind only shattered statues of ice in a silent, frozen wasteland.
